pageContext.name: Vultura Macabra Arctic Melt
pageContext.description: Sideshow and 3D Retro are thrilled to present the Vultura Macabra Arctic Melt Vinyl Collectible!  Standing 14″ tall, Camille Rose Garcia's vulture steps off her canvases and onto collector's shelves. Perched on a skull pile while seeking shelter under a parasol, the scavenger is a colorfully complex carnivore. Garcia's character comes to life with a strong sculpt, utilizing several sculpted layers of feathers rather than relying on paint alone.  About the Artist:  Drawing from an eclectic range of influences, Camille Rose Garcia makes visually engaging work with political messages. In her psychedelic, eye-popping paintings, detailed drawings, toys, and books she combines recognizable cartoon images and pop-cultural references. She strives for both visual pleasure and trenchant social criticism in her work.
